---
title: "Teaching"
---

## University of Amsterdam — Amsterdam School of Economics

**Tutor, Experimental Economics (Honours Bachelor)** — *Apr–Jul 2024*

## Mathematical Institute, Leiden University

**Teaching Assistant, Statistics** — *Aug–Nov 2023*

Headed the Leiden University College Statistics Centre, which employed the Student Assistants.

## Leiden University College The Hague

**Student Assistant, Quantitative Research Methods** — *2022*
